name: Google Ads for Political Campaigns
description: Google's advertising platform, used by political campaigns for search ads, YouTube pre-roll, and display advertising. Subject to Google's political advertising policies including identity verification and ad transparency.
whyUseIt: Google Ads lets campaigns reach voters who are actively searching for information about candidates, issues, and elections. YouTube pre-roll reaches voters during their daily media consumption. Search ads capture high-intent voters looking for election information.
aiCapabilities: Smart bidding, responsive search ads, audience targeting, performance prediction
funnelPosition: Top and mid funnel — awareness and consideration
marketerWorkflow: Set up verified political advertiser account, create search campaigns targeting electorate-specific keywords, run YouTube pre-roll in target postcodes, retarget website visitors with donation asks
managerExpects: Weekly ad performance: impressions, clicks, cost per click, website visits, donation conversions from ads

vocabulary.definition: Showing ads only to people in specific geographic areas — essential for electorate-level campaigns
Google requires political advertisers to verify identity and all political ads are logged in a public transparency report

beginnerMistakes: Not verifying as a political advertiser — Google will reject your ads
Targeting too broadly instead of focusing on your specific electorate
